body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Science. Grade level: Class IX. Session: Tissues - Session 1. Concept: What is a Tissue?. Visual requirement: Diagram showing a cluster of identical cells labeled 'Tissue' vs. scattered individual cells. Style: textbook-friendly, scientific, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, centered composition, white or light background, student-safe. Important: do not draw any words, letters, labels, captions, heading text, numbering, or watermark inside the image. Show the concept visually only. Keep all explanation outside the image. Prefer clean shapes, arrows without text, color-coded parts, and simple educational composition.

options.negative_prompt: no words, no text, no letters, no typography, no labels, no captions, no title text, no handwritten text, no gibberish text, no watermark
